config.server.bridge_address_hint: External address for webhooks and callbacks. Leave empty to auto-detect.
config.server.oauth_redirect_hint: Override base URL for OAuth callbacks (e.g. when behind reverse proxy).
config.server.https_desc: Enable HTTPS with automatic, custom, or self-signed certificates. Works independently of other settings.
config.server.cert_auto_notice: Automatic certificates via Let's Encrypt. Requires a publicly reachable domain and ports 80/443.
config.server.cert_custom_notice: Use your own TLS certificate files (PEM format). You can upload them below or specify file paths.
config.server.cert_upload_missing: Please select both a certificate and a key file.
config.server.cert_upload_success: Certificate uploaded successfully. Restart to apply.
config.server.cert_selfsigned_notice: A self-signed certificate will be auto-generated. Browsers will show a security warning.
config.server.cert_selfsigned_domain_hin: Used as Subject Alternative Name in the certificate.
config.server.cert_regen_success: Self-signed certificate regenerated. Restart to apply.
config.server.https_disabled_desc: Enable HTTPS to secure connections with TLS encryption. Choose between automatic (Let's Encrypt), custom, or self-signed certificates.
